title: 18k_ATRA
characteristics_ch1.1: infection status: Infected with Mycobacterium tuberculosis
treatment_protocol_ch1: MO-GMCSF were infected for 12 hours with Mycobacterium tuberculosis at MOI=1 (or left uninfected), then treated with the indicated compounds at 10 μM, 0.2% DMSO or plain media for 11 hours prior to lysis.
growth_protocol_ch1: Human primary monocytes were positively selected (CD14) from healthy donor peripheral blood mononuclear cells, then matured in 50 ng/mL GM-CSF for 6 days to create MO-GMCSF.
extract_protocol_ch1: RNA was extracted with buffer RLT (Qiagen) and purified on Zymo columns with off-column DNA digestion.
extract_protocol_ch1.1: Libraries were constructed using the KAPA mRNA HyperPrep kit.
data_processing: Reads were aligned with STAR aligner (version 2.6.0) in the RSEM program (version 1.2.29).
data_processing.1: RNAseq counts were analyzed in R (version 3.6.3) with DESeq2 (version 1.24.0).
data_processing.2: During analysis in R, gene names were retrieved with biomaRt (version 2.40.5) and log2 fold-changes were shrunk with apeglm (version 1.6.0).
data_processing.4: Supplementary_files_format_and_content: SuppTable1-ext_RNAseq-Data-ext.xlsx: Raw counts are included in two sheets of the Excel document (one with and one without donor 18p counts); donors 18k, 18o, and 19a were used to calculate the log2 fold-changes and significance values in the other sheet.
contact_institute: Harvard T.H. Chan School of Public Health

data_processing.2: During analysis in R, gene names were retrieved with biomaRt (version 2.40.5) and log2 fold-changes were shrunk with apeglm (version 1.6.0).
data_processing.4: Supplementary_files_format_and_content: SuppTable1-ext_RNAseq-Data-ext.xlsx: Raw counts are included in two sheets of the Excel document (one with and one without donor 18p counts); donors 18k, 18o, and 19a were used to calculate the log2 fold-changes and significance values in the other sheet.
contact_institute: Harvard T.H. Chan School of Public Health
